package rulecoverage

func PositiveCacheMethodUsesContextBackground() string {
    ruleID := "cache_method_uses_context_background"
    family := "context"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Cache implementations that call context.Background() or context.TODO() instead of propagating caller context."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
